site_description: The Association of Volunteer Teams of Ukraine (AVKU) unites volunteers and partners to support the Armed Forces of Ukraine, provide humanitarian aid, and rebuild the country.
shared_support_donation_desc: Every contribution turns into specific aid based on real requests.
meta_home_title: Association of Volunteer Teams of Ukraine — support for the Armed Forces, humanitarian aid, volunteer initiatives
meta_home_desc: The Association of Volunteer Teams of Ukraine (AVKU) unites volunteers and partners to support the Armed Forces, provide humanitarian aid, and rebuild the country. Join us: donate or become a volunteer.
meta_about_desc: About us — Association of Volunteer Teams of Ukraine.
meta_contacts_desc: Contacts — Association of Volunteer Teams of Ukraine.
meta_publications_desc: Publications — Association of Volunteer Teams of Ukraine.
meta_reports_desc: AVKU work reports: what was done, photos/documents, related fundraisers and publications. Transparency → trust → support.
meta_news_title: News — AVKU | support for the Armed Forces, humanitarian initiatives, partnerships
meta_news_desc: Official AVKU updates: aid deliveries, humanitarian initiatives, partnerships, events, and recognitions. Join us: donate, volunteer, partner.
meta_events_title: AVKU events — charity activities, volunteer workshops, humanitarian deliveries
meta_events_desc: AVKU calendar of events and formats: charity fairs, volunteer workshops, humanitarian deliveries, educational and partner activities. Join as a volunteer or support with a donation.
meta_donate_desc: Choose an aid direction, donate, or join as a volunteer/partner. Afterward, review the reports and come back to support the next fundraisers.
meta_join_desc: Join the Association of Volunteer Teams of Ukraine: logistics, workshops, communications, events. Fill out a short form and we will suggest how best to help.
hero_header: ASSOCIATION OF VOLUNTEER TEAMS OF UKRAINE
hero_slogan: VOLUNTEERS BY THE CALL OF THE HEART — EITHER YOU FIGHT OR YOU HELP!
hero_text: We unite volunteer initiatives and partners to respond quickly to requests, support the Armed Forces of Ukraine, and help people.
home_hero_note: Official donation details are available only on our website.
urgent_need_1_desc: We help cover urgent requests: equipment, communications, power solutions, drones, and other essentials as needed.
urgent_need_2_title: Humanitarian kits and support for resilience points
urgent_need_2_desc: Tea, coffee, water, hygiene items, and other essentials for people in difficult conditions.
activity_zsu: Support for the Armed Forces of Ukraine
activity_zsu_desc: We collect and deliver essential equipment and supplies to the front — based on unit requests.
activity_humanitarian_desc: Regular deliveries of food, medicine, and hygiene supplies for service members and civilians.
activity_manufacturing_desc: Camouflage nets, trench candles, and other essentials — together with volunteers and partners.
activity_veterans_desc: Support for veterans and families, educational and cultural initiatives, charity events, and cooperation with organizations.
home_photos_aria: Go to reports and photo reports
home_partners_about_aria: Learn more about AVKU and partners
home_final_volunteer_desc: Fill out a short form and we will help you find the best way to join.
home_final_partner_desc: Businesses and organizations can support specific goals and receive transparent reporting.

pub1_desc: Article on Ukraine’s volunteer movement during the war.
pub4_desc: Annual report on AVKU activities in 2024.
reports_subtitle: Photo reports and confirmations of completed work are collected here: what was done, when, and how to verify it.
reports_no_media: Photos for this report will be added when available.
reports_no_docs: Documents for this case are available in the Publications section.
reports_next_title: Want to see results more often?
reports_official_desc: If you need summary reports and files (PDF/documents), they are collected in the Publications section.
news_hero_slogan: Updates about aid, partnerships, events, and reporting
news_hero_text: Here we publish short summaries of what has been done. Please support us with a donation or join as a volunteer so we can do more.
news_no_results: Nothing found. Please try another query or choose “All”.
news_noscript: Search and filters work better with JavaScript enabled.
news_aside_channels_desc: We publish some materials on social media. Please subscribe: it also supports our work.
news_aside_help_desc: Donation, volunteering, or partnership: every format is useful.
news_aside_no_docs: There are currently no additional publications in this block.
news_aside_docs_note: If needed, this block can be moved to JSON/CMS later.
news_aside_tip_desc: For quick search, try short keywords: “drones”, “memorandum”, “net”, “forum”.
events_hero_slogan: Event formats, how to join, and a selected archive.
events_hero_text: We publish upcoming event announcements in the Facebook group. On the site you will find the structure, clear steps for volunteers, and examples of past events.
events_hero_note: For a quick start, write to us or come to an announced event. We will explain what to do.
events_upcoming_help: Need help with registration or questions
events_join_1_desc: See “Event formats” below or open an announcement in the Facebook group.
events_join_3_desc: Packing, sorting, logistics, workshops, communications, or organization - we will find a role that matches your abilities.
events_archive_desc: These are examples of events that have already taken place, based on Gallery materials. Add new events here and the page will become an even stronger proof of transparent activity.
events_faq_1_q: Where can I see the current schedule?
events_faq_1_a: In the Facebook group: announcements, addresses, and needs appear there fastest.
events_faq_2_a: It depends on the format. Write to us and we will explain what is needed for a specific event.
events_faq_3_q: I want to help but do not know how
events_faq_3_a: That is normal. Fill out a short form and we will find a role and explain the first steps.
events_final_volunteer_desc: Please fill out the form and we will quickly guide you.
events_final_suggest_desc: Have an idea, partners, or a location? Write to us and we will discuss the format and safety.
donate_step_2: Support with a donation or action
donate_help_micro_1: Need help with payment? Write to us:
donate_aside_title: I want to help without donating money
donate_aside_desc: If hands-on participation or resources are closer to you, that is just as valuable.
donate_current_hint: Updated for the current unit request. Thank you for your support.
donate_choose_hint: Click “Choose” and the donation widget on the right will immediately switch to that direction.
donate_trust_hint: We make it easy to check where funds went and what was done.
donate_faq_1_q: How quickly does a report appear?
donate_faq_1_a_1: After purchase or delivery, we publish a report in the
donate_faq_2_a: Yes. You do not have to leave contact details. If you want to receive a report link, leave your contact below.
donate_faq_3_q: What if the payment did not go through?
donate_widget_sub: Choose a direction on the left or donate to general support.
donate_progress_meta: Data updates automatically if the API is configured.
donate_pay_hint: If the link does not open, write to us using the contacts below.
donate_after_title: After donating, receive a report link
donate_after_desc: If you want, leave your contact and we will send a report link for this direction.
donate_comment_placeholder: For example: I want a report for this fundraiser
join_hero_slogan: Volunteers by the call of the heart — either you fight or you help!
join_hero_text: Join the AVKU community. Every form of participation matters, from a few hours a month to regular help. Tell us about yourself and we will find the right role.
join_message_placeholder: How much time can you give, what can you do, and how would you like to help?
join_note_1: The button will open your email app with a prepared message to
join_note_2: If that is inconvenient, just write to us directly.
not_found_text: The link may be outdated or the page may have been moved.
